decisions.title: Approve Catalog Update Service Kafka Architecture
decisions.context: Three-part Kafka consumer design (ENG-9423/9424/9425) for multi-channel parquet files and catalog notifications. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar - enables real-time catalog updates at customer scale.

arguments.for: Unblocks real-time data ingestion scalability; aligns with Signal>Evidence architecture; enables multi-tenant isolation
arguments.against: Adds Kafka operational complexity; schema evolution risk; increases infrastructure cost ~15%

decisions.title: Ship CSRS DataFusion Migration to Production
decisions.context: Channel State Read Service migration (ENG-9493/9460/9457/9456) from custom parquet reader to DataFusion. Foundational for 'Nail the Core' - 3x read performance improvement impacts Explore V2 query speed.

arguments.for: Proven 3x performance gain in benchmarks; reduces maintenance burden; industry-standard query engine
arguments.against: Migration risk for 200+ production customers; requires comprehensive rollback plan; 6-week timeline aggressive

decisions.title: Gate Policy API Release Behind Validation Endpoint
decisions.context: ENG-9398 blocking public API release. Policy API enables 'Build the Moat' - programmatic governance is competitive differentiator. Validation endpoint prevents customer misconfiguration.
decisions.blockedBy: Validation endpoint implementation incomplete; security review pending

arguments.for: Prevents 80% of known misconfiguration patterns; enables self-service governance workflows
arguments.against: Delays public API GA by 2 weeks; adds 40 hours engineering work; validation logic may be incomplete

decisions.title: Prioritize File Upload Arbitrary Type Support
decisions.context: ENG-9600 + ENG-9406 enable CEL file queries in Canvas. Directly increases 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' - customers can query PDFs, logs, configs in decision workflows.

arguments.for: Top 3 Canvas feature request; unlocks 12 blocked POCs; differentiates from competitors
arguments.against: Security scanning for arbitrary files adds complexity; S3 storage costs increase 2x; malware risk

decisions.title: Resolve Explore V2 Pathname Migration Blocker
decisions.context: ENG-9550 migration impacts Explore V2 bookmark stability. Blocks 'Nail the Core' - broken links degrade user trust in core product.

arguments.for: 200+ customer bookmarks at risk; blocks Explore V2 GA promotion; backward compatibility preserves trust
arguments.against: 2-day rush work may introduce bugs; redirect logic adds 50ms page load time
